summary: Tested all 8 bug fixes on /play page: category strip, dim modal, Mira picks, GuidedPlayPaths, Continue button, Book a Service tab, Mira orb color, and duplicate orb fix. Found and fixed 2 bugs during testing. All 10 test items passing.

minor.issue: Intermittently returns 'Failed to fetch' (TypeError: Failed to fetch) in Playwright browser context. Works fine via curl. Possible CORS/network issue in test environment only.

issues: Background color evaluates as rgb(255,255,255) in computed style even though photoBg gradient is applied as inline style. Cards look visually correct with gradients (verified by screenshot) but computed style check shows white. Not a visual bug.

bugs_found_and_fixed.bug: React not imported as default in PlaySoulPage.jsx
bugs_found_and_fixed.root_cause: DimExpandedModal component at line 619 uses React.useEffect but import was { useState, useEffect, useCallback } without default React import
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed import to: import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'

bugs_found_and_fixed.bug: Duplicate Mira orb on /play and /go pages
bugs_found_and_fixed.root_cause: MiraAI.jsx had pillarPaths list that excluded /play and /go. On these pages, both MiraAI (global App.js) AND MiraChatWidget (PillarPageLayout) rendered their own Mira orb, creating 2 orbs
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added '/play' and '/go' to pillarPaths list in MiraAI.jsx so MiraAI hides itself on those pages

test_results.1_category_strip_centered: PASS - justifyContent=center confirmed programmatically, 6 items: Outings & Parks, Playdates, Dog Walking, Fitness, Swimming, Soul Play
test_results.2_six_strip_items: PASS - All 6 items present and centered
test_results.3_dim_card_full_modal: PASS - Outings dim card opens as position:fixed overlay with z-index:600 (full modal, not inline)
test_results.4_products_in_dim_modal: PASS - 86 product cards loaded in Outings modal (with 'Mira recommends' + 'View Details' + images)
test_results.5_mira_picks_section: PASS - Shows AI Scored SERVICE cards (Swimming Sessions 78, Dog Walking 75, Pet Parks Discovery 65, Socialisation Planning 60)
test_results.6_guided_play_paths_style: PASS - 6 path cards with colored backgrounds (rose, cream, blue, orange, green, purple), step chips, Mira Pick badges, Start path button
test_results.7_continue_button_in_modal: PASS - The Park Routine modal shows Step 1 of 4, Mira quote, radio buttons (5 options), and Continue button visible at y=768 (grayed until answer selected)
test_results.8_book_service_tab: PASS - Shows 'Play, Personally' heading, ENJOY section, 8 horizontal service cards with images and 'Book X-step' CTAs
test_results.9_mira_orb_rust_color: PASS - Orb background confirmed as rgb(231, 111, 81) = #E76F51
test_results.10_single_mira_orb: PASS - After fix to MiraAI.jsx, only 1 Mira orb visible on /play page

action_items: Consider adding /go and /play to pillarPaths in MiraAI.jsx for other pillar pages that also use MiraChatWidget (already fixed by this agent)
Test /go page to verify no duplicate orb there either (same fix applies)
Note: Pet loading on /play is intermittent in test environment (needs fresh token or network can be slow). Not a production bug - works consistently when using the login form.
critical_code_review_comments: PlaySoulPage.jsx was missing default React import but used React.useEffect in DimExpandedModal - FIXED
MiraAI.jsx pillarPaths didn't include /play and /go - causing duplicate orb - FIXED
PlaySoulPage.jsx is 1330 lines - consider splitting into smaller components (PlayExploreTab, PlayFindTab, BookServiceTab) for maintainability
Auth token loading is slightly fragile - pet data fetch sometimes fails when navigating directly to /play with localStorage token injection, but works with form login
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two bugs were found and fixed during this iteration: 1) PlaySoulPage.jsx missing React default import (React.useEffect error when clicking dim cards), 2) MiraAI.jsx didn't include /play and /go in pillarPaths causing duplicate orb. Both fixed. Auth: use dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 for login. For Playwright tests, use localStorage.setItem('tdb_auth_token', JWT) NOT 'token' or 'access_token'. The key is 'tdb_auth_token'. Pet fetch is intermittent - wait for .play-strip selector to confirm page loaded.

duplicate_orb.root_cause: App.js renders MiraAI globally. PillarPageLayout renders MiraChatWidget for pillar pages. MiraAI checks pillarPaths list to hide itself on pillar pages, but /play and /go were missing from that list
duplicate_orb.fix: Added '/play' and '/go' to pillarPaths array in MiraAI.jsx line 198
duplicate_orb.reproduction: Navigate to /play, count mira-orb elements - was 2, now 1

dim_modal_crash.description: Clicking dim card threw 'React is not defined' error
dim_modal_crash.root_cause: PlaySoulPage.jsx imported React hooks as named exports only (useEffect, useState, useCallback) but DimExpandedModal component used React.useEffect syntax requiring default React import
dim_modal_crash.fix: Added React as default import: import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
dim_modal_crash.reproduction: Click any dim card on /play - was crashing with React error, now shows full modal
